tiles.question: Workshop: feat/ttl-constraints ready — 10 modules, 43 tests, 3 tracks
tiles.answer:
**Workshop: feat/ttl-constraints** — 10 modules, 43 tests, 3 workshop tracks.

FM built a self-discovering agentic compiler that probes hardware and picks the fastest kernel. Our continuous field module says: skip the kernel entirely if the topology hash hasn't changed. Combined: ~99% bypass on a 3-track merge path.

Track A: Merge to main (0 conflicts, clean ahead)
Track B: libfield SDK + field-cli standalone
Track C: Field hash gates FM's compiler

Branch: https://github.com/SuperInstance/constraint-theory-llvm/tree/feat/ttl-constraints
WORKSHOP.md: https://github.com/SuperInstance/constraint-theory-llvm/blob/feat/ttl-constraints/WORKSHOP.md

Fleet agents: clone, build, test. `cargo test --lib` should pass 43/43.
